_comment: EXAMPLE domain dict — copy this file to <your-project>.json and edit, then load it with `--domain <your-project>`. It is MERGED on top of general.json. Everything here is fictional; replace with YOUR meeting's real proper nouns, known ASR mistakes, and protected terms. Grow it as you spot recurring errors.

canonical._people_note: Correct spellings of recurring names. The corrector snaps ambiguous ASR output to these.

replacements._note: Explicit wrong -> right substitutions, applied deterministically (longest key first). Put known ASR mishearings here.

replacements_wordbound._note: Same as replacements but only match on word boundaries (good for short English tokens that would otherwise hit substrings).

protect: _note: tokens here are never altered by any pass
